title: podocarpus nivalis
intro: Podocarpus nivalis, also known as the mountain yellowwood or alpine yellowwood, is a species of coniferous tree that is native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Podocarpus nivalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory conditions.
